title: Resources for preventing substance use and related harms among youth - Canada.ca
content:
## Resources for preventing substance-related harms in youth
This page has practical tools and resources that school communities and community organizations can use to help prevent substance-related harms among youth.
- For school communities
- For community organizations

## For school communities
Discover useful strategies that can help schools address substance-related harms and support student wellbeing.

## For community organizations
Learn about our community-based funding program designed to support communities to help prevent and delay substance use among youth.
Learn  about community-based programs designed to prevent substance-related harms  among youth, based on the implementation of the Icelandic Prevention Model in a  Canadian community.

## List of all resources
An evaluation guide to support community-based interventions to prevent substance-related harms in youth: Based on the implementation of the Icelandic Prevention Model in Lanark County, Canada
Rethinking Conversation around Youth Substance Use
Blueprint for Action: Preventing substance-related harms among youth through a Comprehensive School Health approach
Preventing substance-related harms among Canadian youth through action within school communities: A policy paper
Blueprint for action: To prevent substance-related harms among youth
Preventing substance-related harms among youth: A blueprint for action – in short
Beyond health education: Preventing problematic substance use by enhancing students' well-being
Promoting well-being: Preventing problematic substance use through positive youth development
Welcoming environments: Preventing problematic substance use through positive youth development
Effective programming: Preventing problematic substance use through positive youth development
Preventing Problematic Substance Use Through Positive Youth Development - Promoting Well-Being
Preventing Problematic Substance Use Through Positive Youth Development - Welcoming Environments
Preventing Problematic Substance Use Through Positive Youth Development - Effective Programming
